# Sponsors & Partners

## 💎 Headline partner

**[Multilogin](https://multilogin.com/pricing/?utm_source=saas&utm_medium=partner&a_aid=saas&a_bid=f5fad549)** — antidetect browser, real Android cloud phones, built-in proxy, 90 API endpoints. Use codes `SAAS50` or `MIN50` at checkout.

## 🤝 Become a sponsor

We accept sponsorship via [GitHub Sponsors](https://github.com/sponsors/multilogin-labs).

Sponsor tiers:

| Tier | Recognition |
|---|---|
| 🥉 Backer ($5+) | Name in `SPONSORS.md` |
| 🥈 Sustainer ($25+) | Logo + link in `SPONSORS.md` |
| 🥇 Partner ($100+) | Logo on README + AWESOME.md |
| 💎 Headline ($500+) | Reserved for vendors building on Multilogin / antidetect ecosystem (one slot at a time) |

## Past & current backers

| Slot | Name |

| 1 | _your name here — open a PR_ |

---

We **don't accept** sponsorship for vendor links that conflict with Multilogin partner content. PRs adding non-relevant affiliate links will be closed.
